def solve(n : Int64, edges : Array(Array(Int64)), label : String) : Int64
    graph = Array.new(n) { [] }
    edges.each do |u, v|
        graph[u].push(v)
        graph[v].push(u)
    end

    max_len = 1

    def dfs(current_node : Int64, visited : Array(Int64), path : Array(Char))
        is_palindrome = (path.join('') == path.join('').reverse?)
        if is_palindrome
            max_len = [max_len, path.size].max
        end

        graph[current_node].each do |neighbor|
            if !visited.include?(neighbor)
                new_visited = visited.dup
                new_visited.push(neighbor)
                new_path = path.dup
                new_path.push(label[neighbor])
                dfs(neighbor, new_visited, new_path)
            end
        end
    end

    (0...n).each do |i|
        visited = [i]
        path = [label[i]]
        dfs(i, visited, path)
    end

    max_len
end
```

def solve(n : Int64, edges : Array(Array(Int64)), label : String) : Int64

    edges.each do |u, v|
        graph[u].push(v)
        graph[v].push(u)
    end

    max_len = 1

    def dfs(current_node : Int64, visited : Array(Int64), path : Array(Char))

            max_len = [max_len, path.size].max

        graph[current_node].each do |neighbor|

                new_visited = visited.dup
                new_visited.push(neighbor)
                new_path = path.dup
                new_path.push(label[neighbor])
                dfs(neighbor, new_visited, new_path)
            end
        end
    end

    (0...n).each do |i|
        visited = [i]
        path = [label[i]]
        dfs(i, visited, path)

    max_len

**回文串** 是指正着读和反着读相同的字符串。

**输出：** 3

**示例 2：**

**输入：** n = 3, edges = [[0,1],[0,2]], label = "abc"

- 没有超过一个节点的路径可以形成回文串。

    graph = Array.new(n) { [] }
    edges.each do |u, v|
        graph[u] << v
        graph[v] << u
    end

    max_len = 1

    def is_palindrome(s : String) : Bool
        left = 0
        right = s.size - 1
        while left < right
            return false if s[left] != s[right]
            left += 1
            right -= 1

        true
